provisions.text: UR USES PERMITTED No development permit shall be issued in an Urban Reserve (UR) Zone except for one or more of the following uses: Single unit dwellings, on existing lots provided that a private on-site sewage disposal system and well are provided on the lot Passive recreation uses Uses accessory to the foregoing uses

UR ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any Urban Reserve (UR) Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following requirements: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard: 9.1m Minimum Side Yard: 2.5m Minimum Rear Yard: 2.5m Maximum Lot Coverage: 35% Maximum Height of Main Building: 11m
